releasedToday.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedToday.highlight: 未完成的流行神话，Lil Nas X 的叛逆宣言
releasedToday.highlightEn: An unfinished pop myth, Lil Nas X's rebellious manifesto
releasedToday.summary: Lil Nas X 以未完成专辑《DREAMBOY》挑战传统发行模式，融合流行与嘻哈元素，充满大胆的自我表达和实验性音效。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Lil Nas X challenges traditional release models with the unfinished 'DREAMBOY,' blending pop and hip-hop with bold self-expression and experimental sounds.

releasedToday.title: KL7
releasedToday.highlight: Kendrick Lamar 的叙事史诗，再次定义说唱
releasedToday.highlightEn: Kendrick Lamar's narrative epic, redefining rap once again
releasedToday.summary: 《KL7》延续 Kendrick Lamar 的深度叙事风格，融合爵士与实验嘻哈，探讨身份与时代议题，是年度最受期待的说唱专辑之一。
releasedToday.summaryEn: 'KL7' continues Kendrick Lamar's deep narrative style, blending jazz and experimental hip-hop to explore identity and contemporary issues, one of the year's most anticipated rap albums.

releasedToday.title: Euphoria
releasedToday.highlight: 德国电子大师的迷幻氛围之旅
releasedToday.highlightEn: A psychedelic ambient journey from German electronic master
releasedToday.summary: Schiller 的《Euphoria》以宏大电子音景和空灵人声编织出沉浸式听觉体验，适合冥想与深夜聆听。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' weaves immersive auditory experiences with grand electronic soundscapes and ethereal vocals, perfect for meditation and late-night listening.

releasedToday.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedToday.highlight: Don McLean 1975 年曼彻斯特现场，民谣经典重现
releasedToday.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live, folk classics reborn
releasedToday.summary: 收录 Don McLean 在曼彻斯特的珍贵现场录音，包括《American Pie》等经典曲目，展现他温暖而富有感染力的舞台魅力。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Features rare live recordings of Don McLean in Manchester, including classics like 'American Pie,' showcasing his warm and captivating stage presence.

releasedToday.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedToday.highlight: Robin Trower 的美国现场，蓝调摇滚的炽热瞬间
releasedToday.highlightEn: Robin Trower's US live, blazing moments of blues rock
releasedToday.summary: 吉他大师 Robin Trower 的美国巡演现场专辑，充满即兴独奏和厚重蓝调氛围，是摇滚乐迷的必收之作。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Guitar master Robin Trower's US tour live album, full of improvisational solos and heavy blues atmosphere, a must-have for rock fans.

releasedToday.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedToday.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 2025 年最新现场，能量满格
releasedToday.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band's latest 2025 live, energy at full throttle
releasedToday.summary: Dave Matthews Band 在里士满的现场录音，融合爵士、放克与摇滚，即兴段落精彩纷呈，展现乐队巅峰状态。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Live recording from Dave Matthews Band in Richmond, blending jazz, funk, and rock with brilliant improvisational sections, showcasing the band at its peak.

releasedToday.title: Venice
releasedToday.artist: Orchestra of the Royal Opera House, Covent Garden, Sir Georg Solti
releasedToday.highlight: 威尼斯之声：皇家歌剧院管弦乐团的古典诗篇
releasedToday.highlightEn: The sound of Venice: a classical poem by the Royal Opera House Orchestra
releasedToday.summary: 由 Sir Georg Solti 指挥的皇家歌剧院管弦乐团演绎威尼斯主题作品，音色华丽，充满水城浪漫与历史厚重感。
releasedToday.summaryEn: The Royal Opera House Orchestra under Sir Georg Solti performs Venice-themed works, with splendid tones full of the city's romance and historical depth.

releasedToday.title: Eingenordet
releasedToday.highlight: 德国民谣金属的北欧神话新章
releasedToday.highlightEn: A new chapter of Nordic myth in German folk metal
releasedToday.summary: Versengold 的《Eingenordet》融合北欧民谣旋律与重金属力量，歌词充满史诗叙事，是民谣金属爱好者的惊喜之作。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Versengold's 'Eingenordet' blends Nordic folk melodies with heavy metal power, lyrics rich in epic storytelling, a delightful surprise for folk metal enthusiasts.
